title: pentalepis ecliptoides
intro: Pentalepis ecliptoides, also known as Eclipta alba, is a flowering plant species native to tropical regions, particularly in Asia and North America. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Pentalepis ecliptoides include promoting hair growth, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting liver health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, or used topically in creams and oils to harness its medicinal properties.
